summary: Add exports maps to learning-engine and health-check packages for clean public API
details: Added 'exports' field to package.json for both packages to prevent deep imports. learning-engine exports main entry point and ./meta-awareness submodule with both ESM (.mjs) and CJS (.js) support. health-check exports ESM-only main entry point. Created ESM wrapper files (index.mjs, meta-awareness-tracker.mjs) for learning-engine to support dual-module exports.
impact: Low - improves API clarity and prevents accidental deep imports
